strengths: Deep TypeScript and Node.js expertise with React and AWS CDK experience directly matching the required tech stack
LLM/AI tooling and MCP framework experience at re:cinq satisfies the most valuable nice-to-have qualifications
Kubernetes experience (GISCollective) and AWS CDK usage (Optilyz) cover infrastructure nice-to-haves beyond what most applicants would bring
concerns: Candidate is a Staff/Senior engineer with 15+ years of experience — heavily overqualified for a junior/mid entry-level role, creating a significant retention and expectations mismatch
Relational database exposure is primarily MongoDB and limited SQL; PostgreSQL — the preferred database for this role — is absent from the resume
Current career gap since October 2025 with no stated reason suggests the candidate may be targeting roles at a different seniority or compensation level than this position offers
response.justification: Bogdan has excellent technical breadth across the required stack and exceeds the nice-to-have criteria, but the role is explicitly entry-level and the candidate is a Staff Software Engineer with over 15 years of professional experience across high-scale systems; placing him in a junior/mid IC role carries a high risk of disengagement or rapid departure, and the relational database gap (MongoDB-heavy, no PostgreSQL) is an additional functional concern for a platform that relies on structured data workflows.
